name: backup-ai
description: MEOK AI Labs — Backup scheduling, verification, retention policies. 3-2-1 rule, SOC2 backup compliance.

tools.name: create_backup_plan
tools.description: Create a backup plan following 3-2-1 rule (3 copies, 2 media types, 1 offsite).

tools.name: verify_backup
tools.description: Verify backup integrity using hash comparison.

tools.name: list_backups
tools.description: List available backups in a directory.

tools.name: calculate_backup_size
tools.description: Calculate estimated backup size and time.

tools.name: retention_policy
tools.description: Generate retention policy for compliance (SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA).
